reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: I booked a room but when I arrived, I was not given the room because a regular customer of the owner was staying there, so I had to cancel and look for another hotel.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
we did not know my room type had no  window, and it was suffocating. it wasn't mentioned in the room info that it had literally no view at all.
and the price aint worth it at all. 
moreover it was a bit far from the beach. No bellman, we had to carry everything from the car to the lobby.
reviews.response: Dear Tuấn, Xin Chao, thank you for staying with us and posting your review. Kindly be rest assured that we shall work on the feedback to ensure that we take the services and offerings to the next level. Please do not hesitate to contact me for any further assistance. Warm regards Ryan

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Breakfast at the Ks is very bad. There are few dishes and not enough food.

reviews.title: I think it's the best choice in Panlang.
reviews.text: It's a new hotel and I stayed in a room with a balcony for around 40,000 won. You can think of it as a Korean motel level, but the bathroom ceiling in my room had leaks, so there were serious stains. The location is good, and it's nice that you can walk to the G-Mart. The response speed of the smart TV is a bit slow, but I don't know why a new product would be slow. The lobby staff were friendly, which was nice. When I travel in Southeast Asia, I habitually spray insecticide and burn electronic mosquito repellent as soon as I enter the room, but on the first night a lizard appeared and the next morning I found a huge cockroach on the floor, almost dead. I never opened the balcony or window during my stay, so it seems like it was already there. The staff mentioned changing my room, but I found it too bothersome, and since the room I had already had insecticide sprayed, I decided to stay. The room size was spacious and the bedding was good. The balcony wasn't wide, but it wasn't small either. Breakfast was included, but there weren't many options and hardly anything worth eating. If you request food in the kitchen, there are separate menus prepared for each day, although… well, it's just okay. I think this place is the best for staying in the city of Phan Rang. It's not amazing, but it's not bad either, and there are many bars around in the evening, making it nice for having a beer.
reviews.response: Dear Deokin, Xin Chao, thank you for staying with us and posting your fabulous review. I have cascaded the appreciation to the team, and they are delighted to hear from you. Please do not hesitate to contact us for any further assistance and all of us here look forward to welcoming you back in the near future. Warm regards, Ryan

reviews.title: Awesomeness! Superb! Extraordinary!
reviews.text:
Devesun  is THE place to be when staying on Pham Rang. From the moment of our arrival, front desk reception  was very welcoming. Throughout our stay, all the staff was resourceful and courteous. The breakfast options and selections were  ample and fresh. 
I wholeheartedly recommend  Devesun and definitely would stay again.
reviews.response:
Dear Ngọc, Xin Chao and Greetings from Devesun Boutique Hotel Ninh Thuận

The team and I are delighted to hear that you thoroughly enjoyed your stay. Thank you for sharing your experience and we look forward to welcoming you back in the not-so-distant future.
Warm regards

Ryan

reviews.title: I was a bit shocked! But its ok.
reviews.text:
I found the hotel beautiful, the room quite clean and new, but the hallway was dim with yellow lighting, which felt rather gloomy. I stayed one night and it was fine, so I booked another night. On the second night, when I asked the front desk staff to bring my food upstairs, the male staff member’s tone on the phone didn’t sound very friendly when I requested his help.

Afterwards, he brought the food to my room. I asked him to please leave it outside, but then I heard him say, “That’s so unhygienic...” I explained that I was changing clothes, so I just wanted it left outside, and then he said he’d hang it on the door. It was the first time I’ve ever heard a hotel staff member speak like that to a guest.

Later, when I checked out in the evening, I realized my sandals were missing. I called the hotel to check, and was told housekeeping had thrown them away because the strap was broken??? I’m not even sure if they were broken, because I had just worn them to a wedding the night before with no problem. So in the end, I lost a pair of sandals worth 2 million VND. I think the hotel should train staff more carefully regarding handling guests’ belongings. I was honestly quite shocked.

I will rate 4-5 stars if thats situation not happens, but now I lost my new shoes and they way the staff talk to me,  so sorry, I dont have good exp anm.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Need shelf for soap and shampoo in the shower

reviews.title: Spacious rooms but noisy
reviews.text: Everything is great about this hotel, from the modern, spacious rooms to the excellent English-speaking staff. The only issue is the noise from the nearby beer house, which makes it impossible to sleep if you are a light sleeper like me.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
Hotel is new, clean. Staff is very friendly. There are no buffet breakfast, but you can order on the list, they are quite nice.
Only negative is the shower, water over flow everywhere, but it has a window, so its ok. Will come back if have chance
reviews.response:

Thank you for choosing to stay with us and for taking the time to write a wonderful review. We truly appreciate your positive comments and compliments and look forward to welcoming you again to Devesun Boutique Hotel in the future.
Fond wishes
Ryan

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is conveniently located in the center, has parking space, clean rooms, new equipment, and friendly, cheerful staff... The only small issue is that the hotel lobby area is a bit hot, and there doesn’t seem to be any staff to assist with luggage upon arrival and departure... overall, everything else is good.

reviews.text: The hotel’s location, staff friendliness, and room condition were all excellent. However, the nearby pubs played loud music outside and operated until late at night, which made it difficult to sleep. Everything else was outstanding, but because of that issue, it was very challenging for us, and we will likely choose a quieter hotel next time.

reviews.title: National holiday on September 2nd.
reviews.text: I traveled twice; during this holiday at a hotel located in area K1 - a convenient and bustling location with quite a few cafes, restaurants, and bars nearby. The accommodation is of the Superior type, but the space is still quite comfortable. During the holiday booking on Agoda, breakfast on the 8th floor was included, which is quite convenient for those lazy mornings. The price for the holiday booking was around 700k/night, and I'm not sure if that is reasonable compared to the general rates there. The hotel staff are polite and professional. However, I still feel the room cleaning could improve (based on personal perception), and the hotel has a rather steep parking garage (especially for female guests).
reviews.response:
Dear Phước, Xin Chao and warm greetings
We very much appreciate your lovely review regarding your stay at Devesun Boutique Hotel Ninh Thuạn. It is always a pleasure to receive positive feedback on our service and facilities. I will share it with our team. Appreciation like yours will serve as encouragement to all of our team as we continuously strive in raising the bar. Thank you again for sharing your experience, and we hope to see you soon.
Warmest,
 Ryan

reviews.title: Good experience
reviews.text:
✅ Advantages:
	•	Reasonable cost, new and clean rooms.
	•	Ideal central location, very convenient for transportation — surrounded by many restaurants and cafes.
	•	Friendly and cheerful staff.
	•	Especially: right across the street is a shop selling delicious dry specialties, so try it if you like dried seafood 😋

❌ Limitations:
	•	The room can be a bit noisy in the morning if you are sound-sensitive (possibly due to traffic or other guests).
	•	The breakfast is somewhat monotonous, with commonly available dishes that can become bland if staying for many days.

🎯 Suggestion: If you prioritize a central location and want clean, well-equipped accommodation at a good price, this is a solid choice. You might consider having breakfast outside for more variety.
reviews.response:
Dear Kim, Xin Chao and Greetings from Salinda Resort Phu Quoc Island

The team and I are delighted to hear that you thoroughly enjoyed your stay.
 
Thank you for sharing your experience and feedback on the music and we look forward to welcoming you back in the not-so-distant future.

Warm regards
Ryan

reviews.title: Terrific hotel that delivers on all fronts
reviews.text: I stayed at this hotel for more than a week during my visit to Vietnam and have nothing but excellent things to say about it. Its room offers a modern and elegant style design with all the amenities you need like fast internet and cold central air conditioning. The location of the hotel is also simply unbeatable with shops and restaurants merely steps away. Last but not least, the staff is extremely kind and pleasant. The combination of these benefits makes this a fantastic hotel I will definitely stay at again when I’m back in the area. Thank you to the wonderful staff!

reviews.title: July 21, 2025
reviews.text: The hotel is okay, highly recommended to stay. I booked on Agoda for 450k/night; if booked directly, it would be more expensive depending on the time (600k to 800k). The room is clean, but the breakfast buffet is poor, so you should choose the package without breakfast to save 80k per person, and go out to eat something better. Overall, compared to the poor quality of hotels in Phan Rang, this is the hotel you should choose to stay within this price range. Hotels in Phan Rang are very disappointing, dirty, small rooms, old-fashioned, like a guesthouse,... it is very hard to find a satisfactory place.

reviews.title: Review
reviews.text: The reception is charming and very helpful, not to mention the room service is very attentive and detail-oriented, setting up the room very well. The room is spacious and cool. Breakfast is delicious. I promise that when I go to Vĩnh Hy, I will return to book a room here because I am very satisfied with everything. Oh, the hotel is newly built right in the center as well.

reviews.title: Really new, friendly staff, very cute kitchen.
reviews.text:
Very Clean Room, 5-star standard
Friendly staff, experienced, located right in the Tt K1 area, convenient for travel,
In the evening, the surroundings are very lively,
The hotel has upgraded the room for guests to experience 😊♥️
Thank you, wishing the hotel always maintains its performance as it is now, I will definitely return and recommend it to friends.

Ah, I booked through Agoda, so the price is lower than the published price (during this period)
I stayed in room 302 (this room has been upgraded for free by the hotel 😍)

reviews.title: Great satisfaction
reviews.text: I used to only stay at cheap hotels, and now I'm enjoying such luxury.. I stayed for a day when it was on sale.. I was very satisfied. If there's a discount, definitely use it^^

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The location is right in the city center, convenient for travel, reasonably priced, clean, and the staff is enthusiastic.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is located in the center, clean, with friendly and enthusiastic staff. I will return.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The new hotel is beautiful, surrounded by plenty of shops, clean, comfortable, and worth the money. Everyone should stay here if they have the chance. Since the hotel just started operating, there are still few breakfast options, but I hope they will change, and it will be great.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The attitude of the staff is very good, enthusiastic, and friendly. I will return and choose this hotel again if I come back to Ninh Thuan.

reviews.title: Modern Hotel
reviews.text: I really like my stay here . Very clean modern spacious room. Location is good many restaurants around and walking distance to the convenience store . The staffs here are the best they help us with renting a motorcycle and help us for a transportation when we need to check out. I appreciate the kindness. We will surely comeback again. Very good hotel thumbs up !

reviews.title: Good hotel

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.title: The hotel is new, very clean and beautiful. Luxurious, with enthusiastic staff.
reviews.text: The hotel is worth trying in Phan Rang, right in the center, with convenient transportation. The hotel is beautiful and the staff is enthusiastic.

reviews.title: Devesun Hotel
reviews.text: The new hotel is very beautiful, luxurious, and modern. It's right in the center, so there are many places for entertainment and dining. The staff is friendly and very enthusiastic. If I have the chance, I will definitely come back.

reviews.title: Tolles neues Hotel
reviews.text: Unser Aufenthalt war sehr angenehm. Die Zimmer sind groß und neu. Man hat genügend Platz, auch für seine Sachen. Es gibt einen Smart-TV, der nicht wie in anderen Hotels zu hoch an der Wand hängt, sondern auf Sitzhöhe auf dem Sideboard steht. Einzig die fehlende Anlage für Duschutensilien in der Dusche fand ich mangelhaft. Sich jedesmal bücken zu müssen, passt nicht zu dem sonst hervorragenden Eindruck. Frühstück ist für westliche Gäste etwas wenig überzeugend, es ist für asiatische Gäste ausgelegt. Fand Eier und Yoghurt gut. Musste leider an 2 Tagen das Personal bzw. den Manager bitten andere Gäste darauf anzusprechen, ihre Handies auszumachen. Leider ein weit verbreitetes Problem in Asien, dass Eltern den Kindern Tablett oder Smartphone zum Spielen geben, damit sie selber Ruhe haben. Es wurde von den angesprochenen Eltern aber angenommen. Sonst ist die Atmosphäre im Frühstücksraum sehr gut. Sanfte Hintergrundmusik und phantastischer Blick auf die Berge. Komme gerne wieder, vielleicht mit einem abwechslungsreicheren Frühstück.
reviews.response:
Dear Thomas, Xin Chao and Thank you for the lovely feedback on your experience.
It brings me great pleasure knowing that our team ensured that you enjoyed your stay with us at Devesun Boutique Hotel. I shall share your feedback with the team and make sure that we continue enchanting our guests. We truly value your insights as they help us raise our standards and create even better experiences for our guests. Your input allows us to continuously improve by understanding what we’re doing well and where we can enhance our services. We appreciate your compliments and look forward to welcoming you back soon.
Kind regards
Ryan

reviews.title: Aangename verrassing
reviews.text: Wij zijn aangenaam verrast, mooi hotel. Kamer wat wij hadden was groot en van alle gemakken voorzien.  Dung was zo ontzettend behulpzaam ons te helpen met boeken van de reis naar Phan Thiet en ook nog voor geschoten met het betalen online. Wat een fijn persoon!! Andere personeelsleden van Devesun waren ook oprecht vriendelijk!
reviews.response:

We are elated to hear that you had such a great experience interacting with the team and also enjoyed the facilities.
Please do not hesitate to reach out should we be of any further help, in the meanwhile, looking forward to welcoming you back in the near future.

Warm regards
Ryan
